resources:
DoneBot Back Summary Great work! Focus Sessions Total Focus Break Time Start Again Edit Settings Configure Pomodoro Timer End Session End Session? Are you sure you want to finish your Pomodoro session early? Keep Going Customize your focus session Total session time: %1$d min Manage What To Do The smartest way to manage what you have to do. Plan clearly. Track easily. Never forget what matters. Continue as a Guest Already have an account? Login Login Home Activity Calendar Task Done Task Pending No tasks today Create a new task to get started No daily recurring tasks No weekly recurring tasks No monthly recurring tasks No yearly recurring tasks You don\'t have a task at this frequency yet Nothing scheduled No personal tasks or group deadlines on this day in %1$dh %2$dm Unassigned · still pending Completed
%1$d day left
%1$d days left
%1$d hour ago
%1$d hours ago
%1$d minute ago
%1$d minutes ago
%1$d day ago
%1$d days ago
My Tasks Recurring Tasks Group Tasks Done Pending Overdue Task Done Task Pending Add New Task Task Details Edit Task Details Secret Mode Settings Secret Mode Active Secret Mode Inactive Auto-disable after Save Preference" Close Button Task Title Set time Plan Your Day Task Date When do you want to get notified? Starts Ends Task Description Create Task Update Task Save Changes Cancel OK Only the assignee or an admin can complete this task Only admins can edit this task Profile Change photo Photos Add photo Delete photo? Do you want to remove this photo from the task? Can\'t add photos until the task is synced Photo will upload when the task is synced Failed to upload photo This task is secret — tap to reveal
Group name cannot be empty Failed to save changes Member removed Failed to remove member Please fill in all required fields Task added to group Failed to create task Invite sent successfully Share link feature coming soon Ownership transferred Failed to transfer ownership Profile updated Failed to update profile Photo updated Failed to upload avatar Failed to delete photo Google login error Assign to a group ToDo App Failed to load task Something went wrong Move Up Move Down Now Until the app is closed Home Settings Search Notification Task Statistics Activity Yearly Progress %1$d done · %2$d pending this week Year so far: %1$d done ✅ Include recurring tasks ↑ %1$d%% vs last week ↓ %1$d%% vs last week Same as last week %1$d-day streak 🔥 No streak yet — complete a task today Most productive: %1$s · %2$d tasks Where you focused this week Last 6 months Less More %1$d done · %2$d pending this month ↑ %1$d%% vs last month ↓ %1$d%% vs last month Same as last month Most productive: %1$s · %2$d tasks %1$s activity Last 12 months Tasks by week W%1$d %1$s · %2$d Week %1$d Daily breakdown Back Monday Tuesday Wednesday Thursday Friday Saturday Sunday Mo Tu We Th Fr Sa Su Settings Change App Theme Change Language English EN Turkish TR Saved Successfully Changes Not Saved Changes Discarded Title is required Title is too short Add Timer More Next Pause Start Skip Advanced Settings Details Retry Secret Task Authentication Failed Biometric Authentication Log in using your biometric credential Privacy & Security The time of reopening for secret mode Save Disable Secret Mode logo Join us and start organizing your tasks efficiently! Sign Up with Google OR Full Name Email Password toggle password visibility Confirm Password Sign Up "Already have an account? " Login Logout Logout Are you sure you want to logout? DONEBOT Elevate your productivity Welcome Back Please sign in to your account Email Address name@example.com OR CONTINUE WITH Google Don\'t have an account? Register Your password is too weak Your password is medium Your password is strong Email cannot be blank Invalid email address Password cannot be blank Password must be at least %1$d characters long Forgot Password Recover Access Enter your email address and we will send you a link to reset your password. Send Reset Link "Remember your password? " Back to Login If that email is registered, a reset link has been sent. Reset Password Password reset — please sign in with your new password. This reset link is invalid or has expired. Change Password Current Password New Password Confirm New Password Current password is incorrect Passwords do not match New password must differ from the current one Password changed successfully Update the password used to sign in to your account. Choose a new password for your account. You will need to sign in again afterwards. Close Something went wrong Unknown error Task not found Failed to load tasks Delete task? Task deleted Group task deleted Do you want to delete the task? Delete group? Do you want to delete this group? Group deleted Delete Groups New Group My Groups Let\'s get started Bring your group together in one place Group Name Edit Group Details e.g. The Johnsons, Summer Vacation What is this group for? Collaborating on chores, planning trips, or daily tasks... You\'ll be able to invite your group members and assign tasks to them immediately after creating the group. Create You don\'t have any groups yet. Create a group to start collaborating on tasks with your family. Create New Group Login to create a group Login or Create Account Create Account Notify me at %1$s Plan time saved \"I will notify you when clock hits!\" \"You can always edit your task details.\" Swipe a task left to delete it Swipe a task right to mark it as secret — fingerprint required Long press a task card to drag and reorder your list Tap the + button to create a new task with time and description You can mark a task as secret while creating it via Advanced Settings Use the Calendar tab to view tasks across a custom date range Visit the Activity tab to track your weekly and yearly progress Tap any task card to view and edit its full details Set a daily planning reminder in Settings → Plan Your Day Create groups to organise and share tasks with others Switch between light, dark or system theme in Settings Use the Pomodoro timer to stay focused — tap the timer button Tap any day in the weekly picker to jump to that day\'s tasks Your weekly completed and pending task counts are always shown at the top Long press and drag groups to reorder them in the Groups tab Attach photos when creating a task — the first one shows on the card Tap a group task card to flip it and see who it\'s assigned to Swipe a group task right to take it yourself, or to give it back if it\'s already yours Group tasks can be marked HIGH, MEDIUM or LOW — the badge shows in the top-right Tap your avatar in the top bar to edit your name and change your photo Admins can upload a custom avatar for their group in Group Settings When a Pomodoro session is running, a timer banner stays at the top of every screen Group admins can hand over ownership to another member from Group Settings Search looks through your personal tasks and every group you\'re in at once Long-press a group task card to open the edit sheet — admins only Deleted a task by mistake? Hit Undo in the snackbar before it slides away Switch between English and Türkçe in Settings → Language Tip Pull down for a helpful tip Release for your tip Tasks Done Pending Done Tasks Pending Tasks No tasks this week Tasks will appear here once created Oldest Newest Type to search your tasks Type to search tasks and groups No tasks found for \"%1$s\" Tasks Groups No groups found for \"%1$s\" All Tasks Groups Group Tasks Filter Filters (%1$d) Filters Show Category Recurrence Status Date Any Pending Completed One-off Any time Today This week This month Clear all Apply Pomodoro Timer Your current settings Sessions Focus Short Break Long Break Session Count Sessions per Cycle Focus Time min Duration ~%1$d min total %1$d sessions · %2$dm focus · %3$dm / %4$dm breaks Pomodoro Focus Short Break Long Break Overtime %1$d min %1$dm Add Task Move Up Move Down Group Detail Group Settings Invite Member Manage Members Member Profile Remove from Group Remove Member Are you sure you want to remove this member from the group? Member not found Failed to load member Failed to remove member Transfer Ownership Overview Members Activity No tasks yet. Create your first task to get started! + New Task All Assigned to Me Invite Remove Grow your family group Collaborate on tasks and stay organized together. Send Invite The user must already be registered to receive the invite. User must already be registered with the app to join instantly. Or share invite link Add Member Invite to Family Send an invite to add a new member to your family circle. They\'ll be able to see and manage shared tasks. Please enter a valid email address CURRENT MEMBERS Tap on a member to view details, change roles, or remove them from the group. Select a member to pass admin rights to. You will become a regular member. FAMILY MEMBERS Search members… This action cannot be undone. MANAGEMENT Add or remove people Pass admin rights Delete Group This action cannot be undone. All group data will be lost. Group Description Group Name All caught up Tasks Pending Done Pending ADMIN MEMBER Joined member@example.com Group settings saved Invite sent successfully Group deleted Something went wrong. Please try again. Due Today Due %1$d mins ago %1$d hours ago Yesterday %1$d days ago Task Detail Assign to Me Unassign task Assign to No Assignee No due date Failed to delete task Failed to update task Task title cannot be empty Task updated successfully Edit Task Assignee Priority None Status You Assign to Me Are you sure you want to assign this task to yourself? Assign Stay on top of your tasks Allow notifications so reminders reach you on time. See your daily plan on top Let the app draw over other apps to show your daily plan card. Task title is required Please pick a date Please set start and end time End time must be after start time Notifications You\'re all caught up Mark all as read Couldn\'t mark notifications as read Invitations No pending invitations Invited by %1$s Accept Decline Joined the group Invitation declined Couldn\'t complete that action Appearance Reminders Productivity Privacy Account Accessibility Legal Privacy Policy Terms of Service Delete Account Wait… are you really leaving? This cannot be undone. All your tasks, groups, and chats will be deleted. For groups you own, admin rights will pass to a random member; if you\'re the only member, the group will be deleted too. Type DELETE to confirm DELETE Delete forever Session expired. Please sign in again. Couldn\'t delete the account. Try again or contact support. Deleting account… You\'re now the admin of %1$s Tap to open the group System accessibility settings Reduce motion Disables non-essential animations Text size Adjust system font scaling Push notifications Exact reminders Allow this app to fire reminders at the precise time you set. Exact reminders are enabled. Today Earlier All notifications marked as read New activity from your groups will appear here. Just now Join group? You\'ll be added to %1$s and the inviter will be notified. Decline invitation? We\'ll let %1$s know you decided not to join. When someone invites you to a group, you\'ll see it here. Keep
%1$d member
%1$d members
Remind me No reminder On time 1 min before 30 min before 1 hour before 3 hours before 6 hours before 12 hours before 1 day before Alarm sound No alarm sounds available
Group invitation %1$s invited you to %2$s You\'ve been invited to %1$s Invitation accepted %1$s joined %2$s Invitation declined %1$s declined to join %2$s New task assigned %1$s was assigned to you Task completed %1$s completed “%2$s” Task due soon %1$s is due soon in %2$s Pomodoro Live Timer Live countdown for the active Pomodoro session Your session has expired. Please log in again. Tasks Used for task reminders and updates All Day All day Before noon Afternoon Evening Info Got it Plan Your Day Pick a time and DoneBot will notify you when it\'s time to plan your day. Pomodoro Technique Alternate focused work and short breaks to stay sharp and avoid burnout. Pick the durations and session count that suit you. Focus: a stretch of distraction-free work Short break: a quick reset between sessions Long break: a longer rest after a few rounds Talk to DoneBot DoneBot reads your tasks and can answer questions, create new ones, mark them done. Secret tasks stay invisible — they\'re yours. Ask: \"What\'s due today?\" or \"How was my week?\" Create: \"Add a meeting tomorrow at 3pm\" Limit: secret tasks are invisible to DoneBot Scope: only answers questions about your tasks and groups
Calendar View See your tasks laid out by day. Tap any date to jump to its tasks; long-press a task to edit it. Dots under a day mean tasks are scheduled Switch months by swiping left or right Recurring tasks appear on every matching day
Your Activity Track how your week and month are going. Charts show what you finished, what\'s pending, and your focus streak. Completed vs. pending breakdown Pomodoro focus time totals Streaks reset at midnight
Settings Tune the app to fit you — language, theme, notifications, secret mode, and account options live here. Toggle dark mode and language Manage notification permissions Sign out or delete your account
Add a Pomodoro Timer Build a custom timer: pick focus length, break lengths, and how many rounds you want. Saved timers show on the launch screen. Focus duration sets your work block Long break kicks in after the chosen round You can edit or delete a timer anytime
Task Details Everything about a single task — title, notes, due date, recurrence, alarm, and category. Edit any field to update on the fly. Set a due date to see it on the calendar Recurrence creates the next instance automatically Toggle Done to mark complete
Secret Mode Keep some tasks completely private. Secret tasks need a passcode and never appear in DoneBot, search, or shared activity. Tasks marked secret are hidden until unlocked DoneBot cannot read or modify them Forget the code and the data is unrecoverable
Groups Share tasks with family, friends, or teammates. Create a group, invite members, and assign work together. Anyone in the group can see and complete shared tasks Owners manage members and roles Leave a group anytime from its settings
Create a New Group Give your group a name and optional avatar. You can invite members right after, or do it later from the group screen. Pick a name everyone will recognize An avatar makes it easier to spot You become the owner by default
Filtered Tasks A focused slice of your tasks based on the filter you chose. Tap any to open, swipe to complete. Filters can stack: status + category + date Empty list means nothing matches
Search Find any task by typing a word from its title or notes. Results update as you type. Search ignores case and accents Tap a result to open it directly Secret tasks never show up here
Pomodoro Summary A recap of the session you just finished — focus time, breaks, and rounds completed. Use it to spot patterns over time. Total focus time is added to your activity Skipped rounds aren\'t counted
Group Tasks All shared tasks for this group, plus its members. Anyone in the group can add, edit, or complete them. Tap Members to see who\'s in the group Use the gear icon to open settings Roles show next to each member
Group Settings Rename the group, change its avatar, manage members, or transfer ownership. Some actions are owner-only. Owners can invite or remove members Members can leave anytime Deleting a group removes its tasks for everyone
Invite a Member Send an invite by email. The recipient gets a link to join your group; they\'ll need a DoneBot account. Pending invites can be canceled from group settings Invitees join as members; promote them later
Manage Members See everyone in the group, change their roles, or remove them. Owner privileges are required for changes. Promote a member to admin to share moderation Removing a member revokes their access immediately
Shared Task Details Like a personal task, but visible to the whole group. Edits and completions sync to everyone. See who marked it done Comments and changes are shared in real time
Member Profile A read-only view of a group member — their name, avatar, role, and shared activity within this group. Tap to message or assign tasks (when allowed) Personal task data stays private
Transfer Ownership Hand the group over to another member. They get full owner rights; you become a regular member. Only one owner exists per group This action cannot be undone by you alone
Your Profile Update your display name, avatar, and email preferences. Changes apply across DoneBot immediately. Avatar shows on tasks and groups Change your password from Settings
Notifications Recent alerts from DoneBot — task reminders, group invites, and shared activity. Tap one to jump to its source. Unread items show a red dot Cleared items disappear after a while
Invitations Pending group invites waiting on your decision. Accept to join, decline to dismiss. Accepting adds you as a member right away Declined invites can be re-sent by the inviter
Alarm Sounds Choose the sound that plays when a task alarm fires. Tap one to preview before you set it. Selected sound applies to all task alarms System sounds use your device volume
Session %1$d of %2$d Pause Resume Skip Focus session complete Paused · %1$s %1$d:%2$02d Alarm Overlay Background notice while an alarm overlay is shown Showing reminder
Category Shopping Medicine Health Work Study Birthday Personal Other Custom name
Repeat Don\'t repeat Every day Every week Every month Every year Reminds every day at the chosen time ! Reminds on the same weekday at the chosen time ! Reminds on the same day of the month ! Reminds on the same date every year !
Today Daily Weekly Monthly Yearly
DoneBot Chat DoneBot Ask DoneBot… Send Clear history Hi, I\'m DoneBot Ask me what\'s on your plate, what\'s overdue, or how your week is going. DoneBot is thinking… Something went wrong. Please try again. That response was blocked. Try rephrasing. You\'re offline. Reconnect and try again. Slow down — DoneBot\'s quota is full for now. Wait a minute and try again. Retry Dismiss I got stuck looking things up. Try asking again in a different way. Try again in %1$ds… %1$d/%2$d Looking up your tasks… Copy text Try again Copied Productivity assistant What\'s due today? Anything overdue? How am I doing this week? Plan my day Clear conversation? This deletes your chat history with DoneBot but does not affect your tasks. Clear Clear conversation Send message Scroll to latest message
Close Clear search Back Search Notifications Settings Info Group settings Previous month Next month Toggle password visibility Add task Expand chart You have %1$d task(s) today. You have no tasks today. Want to add one? You have %1$d overdue task(s). Nothing overdue — nice work! You\'ve completed %1$d task(s) this week. Hi! What\'s on your mind today? You are DoneBot, a productivity assistant inside the user\'s to-do app. Your ONLY purpose is helping the user with their tasks and groups in this app. Keep replies short, friendly, and actionable.\n\nEvery user message starts with a `[Context: ...]` block with today\'s date, today\'s tasks, tomorrow\'s task count, overdue count, and this week\'s completion count. Treat this block as the source of truth for trend/count questions — do NOT call getCurrentDate, getTodaysTasks, getOverdueTasks, getTasksForDateRange (for tomorrow), or getCompletedTasksThisWeek when the [Context] block already has the answer. The most recent [Context] block always wins.\n\nTools:\n• Read: getTodaysTasks, getOverdueTasks, getTasksForDateRange, getGroups, getCompletedTasksThisWeek.\n• Write: createTask, updateTask, deleteTask, setTaskCompletion, setTaskSecret.\n• Helper: getCurrentDate — call only if you need a date the [Context] block does not cover.\n\nRules:\n• Always confirm mutations by id and title in your reply (e.g. \"Created \'Buy groceries\' for 2026-05-01\", \"Deleted task 42\").\n• Never mutate without an id; look it up via a read tool first if needed.\n• Never invent task details. Group tasks are not editable from chat — only personal tasks.\n\nScope (STRICT):\n• You MAY answer ONLY: questions about the user\'s tasks, groups, productivity insights inside this app, or how to use the app\'s task/group features. Brief greetings (hi, hello, thanks, merhaba, selam, teşekkürler) are allowed — reply in 1-2 warm words.\n• You MUST refuse everything else — including general knowledge, code, programming, math, news, weather, jokes, stories, opinions, advice on non-task subjects, other apps or services, anything about yourself beyond \"I\'m DoneBot, a productivity assistant\", and any roleplay or persona requests.\n• When refusing, ALWAYS use one of these exact templates (match the user\'s language):\n - English: \"Sorry, I can only help with your tasks and groups in this app. Try asking what\'s on your plate today, or to add/edit a task.\"\n - Turkish: \"Üzgünüm, sadece bu uygulamadaki görevlerin ve grupların için yardımcı olabilirim. Bugün neyin var, ya da bir görev eklemek/düzenlemek ister misin?\"\n• Never explain why you refused. Never list what you can\'t do. No \"as an AI\" disclaimers. No alternative answers, no compromises like \"but here\'s a quick…\".
Good morning, %1$s Good afternoon, %1$s Good evening, %1$s Good night, %1$s Good morning Good afternoon Good evening Good night Morning Midday Evening Night
Today Recurring selected not selected
Ready for today? You finished %1$d tasks yesterday. Want to plan today together? See suggestions Time to wrap up %1$d of %2$d done. What about the remaining %3$d? Move to tomorrow Leave as is All done! 🎉 You completed all %1$d tasks for today. Great work! Got it Dismiss
